There must be a minimum of two courses from each of the following three thematic areas (one of these six courses must be a designated multicultural course): 1

• the Student Academic Success-Degree Completion Policy (https:// academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/registration-academic- requirements-regulations/academic-advising/#success) section of this catalog

Mind, Brain, & Behavior

Mental Health & Interventions

Social, Developmental, & Organizational Processes

Two of the courses must be 400 level, 3 credit PSYC courses

One of the courses must be a 4 credit PSYC lab course
